title: Write AuctionRegistry.sol
description: Auction state machine. DOMAIN_SEPARATOR (EIP712Domain 'AgentAuction', '1', chainId, address(this)). createAuction(auctionId, manifestHash, ...). recordResult(AuctionSettlementPacket, sequencerSig) — emits AuctionEnded. markSettled(auctionId) — onlyEscrow. cancelExpiredAuction(auctionId) — 72h timeout. updateWinnerWallet() — EIP-712 wallet rotation. State: NONE→OPEN→CLOSED→SETTLED (or CANCELLED). setEscrow(address) one-time binding. NO anchorHash. Ref: full_contract_arch(amended).md Section 7.
close_reason: AuctionRegistry.sol written (272 lines) and compiles clean. Full state machine: NONE→OPEN→CLOSED→SETTLED/CANCELLED. EIP-712 DOMAIN_SEPARATOR, recordResult with sequencer sig verification, markSettled (onlyEscrow), cancelExpiredAuction (72h), updateWinnerWallet (EIP-712 Domain 2).

title: Write CRE settlement workflow unit tests using @chainlink/cre-sdk/test mocks
description: Unit tests for cre/workflows/settlement.ts using EvmMock, HttpActionsMock, addContractMock, newTestRuntime from @chainlink/cre-sdk/test. Cover: event decoding, state verification, winner cross-check, replay bundle fetch, report encoding + writeReport.
close_reason: 7 unit tests passing — pure function tests + 5 handler tests (happy path, auction not closed, winner mismatch, replay fail, writeReport reverted). Also fixed: EVMLogTrigger import, protobuf log handling, chain selector name, entry point guard.

title: CRITICAL: Fix paymaster drain — restrict sponsored targets + fix getBondAmount
close_reason: Fixed: Added allowedTargets mapping + setAllowedTarget() in AgentPaymaster; getBondAmount returns 0 when refunded in AuctionEscrow. 113 tests passing.

title: Write MockKeystoneForwarder.sol
description: Mock contract for local dev/testing. Calls onReport(metadata, report) directly on AuctionEscrow. Configurable metadata (workflowId, workflowName, workflowOwner). Used by WS-2 Foundry tests + WS-3 local dev. Ref: ws2-contracts-cre.md Day 1-2.
close_reason: MockKeystoneForwarder.sol written (89 lines) and compiles clean. Simulates KeystoneForwarder with configurable metadata (workflowId, workflowName, workflowOwner, reportId). forwardReport() and forwardReportWithMetadata() for testing.

title: HIGH: Enforce manifestHash match in recordResult
close_reason: Fixed: recordResult now enforces manifestHash match via ManifestHashMismatch error. Tests verify mismatch reverts and correct hash passes.

title: Install CRE CLI and verify version
LOW: Use tryRecover in AgentAccount._validateSignature
close_reason: Fixed: _validateSignature uses ECDSA.tryRecover instead of recover — malformed sigs return SIG_VALIDATION_FAILED instead of reverting.

title: Write AgentAccountFactory.sol
description: CREATE2 factory for deploying AgentAccount wallets. createAccount(address runtimeSigner, uint256 salt) returns deterministic address. getAddress() pure view for address prediction. Supports EntryPoint initCode lazy deployment. Ref: full_contract_arch(amended).md Section 3 + 01-agent-onboarding.md.
close_reason: AgentAccountFactory.sol written (42 lines) and compiles clean with forge build. Uses ERC1967Proxy + CREATE2 deterministic deployment.

title: Run cre workflow simulate against real AuctionEnded tx
description: Execute cre workflow simulate settlement --non-interactive --trigger-index 0 --evm-tx-hash <hash> --evm-event-index 0 on Base Sepolia. Validate output. Then --broadcast for full E2E.
close_reason: CRE simulation ran successfully: WASM compilation OK, AuctionEnded event matched + decoded correctly (auctionId, winner=42, price=200000), callContract invoked (returns zeros from FakeEVMChain — known simulation limitation). 7 unit tests cover full logic with EvmMock.

title: CRE workflow: Add finalPrice cross-verification in Phase B
description: BUG. In helpers.ts Phase B, storedPrice is decoded from getWinner() but never compared against event finalPrice before signing the settlement report. A manipulated price could pass through unchecked. 5-line fix: add comparison between storedPrice and event finalPrice, throw if mismatch.

title: LOW: Optimize _sliceBytes in AgentPaymaster
close_reason: Fixed: _sliceBytes uses MCOPY opcode (Cancun EVM) instead of byte-by-byte loop. More gas efficient.

title: MEDIUM: Enable refunds for cancelled auctions
close_reason: Fixed: claimRefund checks registry.isCancelled() — cancelled auctions allow refunds. Tests verify cancelled auction refund + open auction revert.

title: HIGH: Fix designatedWallet cross-auction misrouting
close_reason: Fixed: Added DesignatedWalletConflict error + conflict detection in _processReport and claimRefund. Tests verify both paths.

title: Foundry project setup
description: forge init contracts, install deps (@account-abstraction/contracts@0.7.0, @openzeppelin/contracts, ReceiverTemplate from Chainlink docs), set solidity=0.8.24 in foundry.toml (Cancun EVM target for Base Sepolia). This is the foundation — all other contract tasks depend on it.
close_reason: Foundry project initialized: forge 1.5.1, solc 0.8.24/Cancun, deps installed (account-abstraction v0.7.0, openzeppelin v5.1.0, chainlink v2.19.0), IAuctionTypes interface created, forge build + test pass.

title: HIGH: Enforce solvency in recordBond + validate depositor
close_reason: Fixed: recordBond validates depositor != address(0), enforces solvency check via checkSolvency(). Tests verify both.

title: Fix any issues from simulation + commit all CRE test artifacts
description: Debug and fix workflow issues found during simulation. Commit unit tests, test scripts, and docs. Push to remote.
close_reason: Committed and pushed: 44c63e7. Fixed SDK imports, 7 unit tests passing, test AuctionEnded event on Base Sepolia, research docs.

title: CRE workflow: Clean up dead config and doc inconsistencies
description: Housekeeping items from security review: (1) Remove unused identityRegistryAddress from config.json — declared in schema but never referenced in workflow code. (2) Update replayBundleBaseUrl from placeholder https://api.auction.example.com to real URL or add TODO comment. (3) Fix README Phase C description — says 'Identity Check' but code does 'Replay Bundle Fetch'. (4) Consider switching LATEST_BLOCK_NUMBER to LAST_FINALIZED_BLOCK_NUMBER for production hardening.

title: Test deployment script compiles and runs on local anvil
close_reason: Deploy script dry-run successful: all 10 steps pass, 81 tests still green

title: AuctionEscrow: Add nonReentrant to onReport() for defense-in-depth
description: MEDIUM severity. onReport() lacks nonReentrant modifier. Call path onReport() -> _processReport() -> registry.markSettled() makes external call to AuctionRegistry without reentrancy guard. Theoretical cross-contract reentrancy if Registry ever makes callbacks. Currently mitigated by checks-effects-interactions ordering but should add nonReentrant as defense-in-depth. One-line fix.

title: MEDIUM: Fix withdraw ownerOf revert blocking admin
close_reason: Fixed: withdraw uses try/catch on ownerOf — admin can withdraw even if ownerOf reverts (burned/unregistered agents). Tests verify.

title: Write AgentPaymaster.sol
description: EIP-4337 Paymaster for gas sponsorship. validatePaymasterUserOp() with method-based gating: USDC.transfer to escrow → only check ERC-8004 registration (no prior bond required); other ops → require bondRecords. postOp() MVP: log gas cost only. Must stake ETH to EntryPoint. Ref: full_contract_arch(amended).md Section 3.
close_reason: AgentPaymaster.sol written (151 lines) and compiles clean. Method-based gating: bond deposit (USDC.transfer to escrow) requires ERC-8004 registration only; other ops require existing bond. MVP postOp: log gas cost only.

title: Create HelperConfig.s.sol for per-chain config (Base Sepolia vs local)
close_reason: Created HelperConfig.s.sol with Base Sepolia and Anvil configs

title: Foundry tests for all contracts
description: AgentAccount.t.sol: validateUserOp passes with correct runtimeSigner, fails with wrong signer. AgentPaymaster.t.sol: bond deposit allowed for registered agent, non-bond ops require bond. AuctionRegistry.t.sol: createAuction → recordResult → markSettled state transitions. AuctionEscrow.t.sol: recordBond → processReport → claimRefund → withdraw full flow. Settlement.t.sol: integration test via MockKeystoneForwarder. Ref: ws2-contracts-cre.md Day 1-2.
close_reason: All 81 tests pass: AgentAccount (15), AgentPaymaster (14), AuctionEscrow (29), AuctionRegistry (23)

title: Create test AuctionEnded event on Base Sepolia via cast
description: Call createAuction + recordResult on deployed AuctionRegistry to generate a real AuctionEnded event. Capture tx hash for cre workflow simulate.
close_reason: Test AuctionEnded event created on Base Sepolia. TX hash: 0xb3386627c5637248129ce659938927c4fc0913edea4440b62441f5588f911ea2, event index: 0, block: 38040775

title: Create MockUSDC and MockIdentityRegistry for testnet independence
close_reason: Created MockUSDC.sol and MockIdentityRegistry.sol in src/mocks/

title: AuctionRegistry: replayContentHash event parameter emits manifestHash
description: LOW severity. recordResult() line 206 sets auction.replayContentHash = bytes32(0) but line 218 emits packet.manifestHash in the replayContentHash event parameter position. Semantic mismatch — event consumers receive manifestHash labeled as replayContentHash. No current impact (skipReplayVerification=true) but will break if replay verification is enabled. Fix: rename event parameter or correctly store/emit replayContentHash.

title: Write Deploy.s.sol deployment script for all 6 contracts + testnet mocks
close_reason: Deploy.s.sol created with 10-step deployment, HelperConfig, mock contracts

title: AuctionEscrow: Call configureCRE() to pin CRE workflow credentials
description: MEDIUM severity. expectedWorkflowId/expectedWorkflowName/expectedAuthor default to zero — if configureCRE() is never called, onReport() skips all CRE metadata validation. Any registered CRE workflow on the DON could submit fabricated settlement reports. Fix: call configureCRE() immediately after deployment. Consider adding require(expectedWorkflowId != bytes32(0)) guard in onReport() for defense-in-depth.

title: MEDIUM: Add workflowName validation in onReport
close_reason: Fixed: onReport validates bytes10 workflowName from metadata. Skips check if expectedWorkflowName is bytes10(0). Tests verify both paths.

title: Write AuctionEscrow.sol
description: Core escrow contract. Inherits ReceiverTemplate + ReentrancyGuard. recordBond(auctionId, agentId, depositor, amount, x402TxId) — onlyAdmin, idempotent on txId. _processReport(bytes report) — decode abi.encode(auctionId, winnerAgentId, winnerWallet, amount), O(1) settlement. claimRefund(auctionId, agentId) — pull-based, deposit-time beneficiary. withdraw() — pull pattern. adminRefund() — emergency. checkSolvency() — view. Solvency invariant: usdc.balanceOf(this) >= totalBonded + totalWithdrawable. Ref: full_contract_arch(amended).md Section 8.
close_reason: AuctionEscrow.sol written (305 lines) and compiles clean. Implements IReceiver for CRE settlement. recordBond with idempotency (txHash+logIndex), onReport metadata validation, _processReport settlement, pull-based claimRefund, withdraw, adminRefund emergency. Solvency check view.

title: Write AgentAccount.sol
description: EIP-4337 smart contract wallet for agents. Inherits BaseAccount, implement _validateSignature(): ecrecover(userOpHash, sig) == runtimeSigner. Store address public runtimeSigner (set at creation, rotatable via setRuntimeSigner). execute() callable only by EntryPoint. NO ZK verification (moved to DO). Ref: full_contract_arch(amended).md Section 3.
close_reason: AgentAccount.sol written: BaseAccount + Initializable, runtimeSigner EOA validation via ecrecover, execute/executeBatch, setRuntimeSigner rotation, all lint clean. 95 lines.
